name: the-stall
description: 269 pay-per-call AI data tools via MCP and x402 — no API keys required. YouTube keyword research (autocomplete suggestions, question/tutorial/comparison intent clusters, expand mode), iOS App Store competitive intelligence, CPI inflation (headline+core+energy+food, MoM/YoY, trend signal, Fed implication), outstanding short interest % float + days-to-cover + squeeze risk, SEC insider trading Form 4, institutional fund holdings, activist investors 13D/13G, M&A intel, VC funding Form D, equity fundamentals, options flow unusual sweep detection, earnings quality Beneish M-Score, on-chain address intelligence, and 257+ more. USDC on Base.
